title: Joodeok YouTube Market Schedule Extractor -- Auto-Subtitle Transcript Pipeline
desc: Auto-fetch latest Joodeok YouTube video auto-subs via yt-dlp, parse Korean transcript for market schedule keywords, extract actionable calendar items. Channel: @joodeok (UChZFFQS6ThJ_VmuE-Yzao8Q). Videos ~6PM KST daily.
steps: FETCH: yt-dlp --write-auto-subs --sub-lang ko --skip-download --sub-format vtt --playlist-end 1 channel-URL. Output ~200KB .ko.vtt.
PARSE: strip timestamps + HTML tags + dedup consecutive lines. ~12k chars clean text per 24min video.
KEYWORD SCAN: schedule keywords in Korean (iljeong/schedule/earnings/rate/expiry/mon-fri/this-week/next-week/tomorrow) and English (FOMC/CPI/PPI/GDP/PCE/ISM).
OUTPUT: schedule-relevant sentences to daily_digest.md + raw transcript to wavevault/youtube_digest/.
LEGAL: auto-captions are machine-generated. Store extracted facts only, not verbatim. Private repo.
RUN: daily after 7PM KST (post upload). GitHub Actions cron or local wkappbot.
ACCURACY: ~80% Korean auto-caption. Cross-ref with official calendars before acting.
INTEGRATION: extracted events feed ai_market_advisor.py as upcoming-events context.
author: claude
